title: From #general
headline: Hey team, Big personal news — I became a dad for the second time! Feeling incred...
quote: Hey team, Big personal news — I became a dad for the second time! Feeling incredibly happy and wanted to share the joy with you all. Stepping away for family duties — back soon!
author: Ivan Khorev

title: From #general
headline: Colleagues, it has been an interesting 1.5-year journey, but I have to move on. ...
quote: Colleagues, it has been an interesting 1.5-year journey, but I have to move on. This company gave me the opportunity to feel truly useful: $317K in fee uplift from the floor optimization project for 2 last quarters, plus $1.5M/year in savings for S3 storage thanks to an approach I invented with zstd
author: Ihor Bobak
